response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile individual contributor with a genuine passion for developer tooling and testing (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD setup, Selenium training, MCP code generators), but this is a Level II people-management role and the resume shows no people-management experience whatsoever. There is no evidence of running one-on-ones, performance management, roadmap ownership, or organizational change — three hard requirements (2+ years people management, 3+ years technical leadership, 3+ years leading org change preferred) are unmet or unsubstantiated. Mobile exposure is limited to a single iOS/Apple TV stint in 2015-2016.
strengths: Deep, authentic developer-tooling and test-infrastructure background (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, CI/dev-ops setup, Selenium courses, MCP generators at Stripe)
15+ years of broad engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems at reputable companies (Stripe, Shopify)
Demonstrated teaching and mentoring inclination through workshops, conference talks, and community training
concerns: Zero people-management experience — no direct reports, performance reviews, or team-building history on the resume
No evidence of strategic roadmap ownership, organizational leadership, or cross-team alignment at the scale the role demands
Mobile-platform knowledge is shallow and dated (one iOS/Apple TV role ending in 2016), while the role centers on a major mobile ecosystem

key_factors.factor: Unproven technical leadership at organizational scale
